cases.label: KTH expired calibration round
manual_review_items: No structured nationality rule is available; inspect the official eligibility text.
Confirm that the applicant is liable to pay tuition fees in Sweden.
Confirm that an eligible KTH master's programme was ranked as the applicant's first priority.
Confirm admission eligibility for the selected KTH master's programme.
Verify the academic-excellence and programme-specific selection factors.
Confirm that the scholarship application was complete before the official deadline.
cases.query: KTH Scholarship Sweden master full tuition fee first priority fee paying student

cases.label: SI expired development round
manual_review_items: Nationality is governed by a regional or economic-group rule that requires authoritative verification.
Verify that the applicant's citizenship appears on the current official list of 34 eligible countries.
Verify that the selected Swedish master's programme is eligible for the SI scholarship.
Confirm tuition-fee liability through University Admissions.
Verify the official work-experience and leadership-evidence requirements.
Check the next application cycle because the inspected 2026 scholarship round is closed.
cases.query: Swedish Institute global professionals scholarship for STEM master's applicants with leadership and work experience full tuition monthly allowance
